author: Dexterity104
title: Concurrent breadth-first multi-language smart-contract vulnerability miner
notes: A general high/critical vulnerability miner for the sn60__bitsec/miner lane across Solidity, Vyper, Rust, Move and Cairo. It ranks the project's own source, then dispatches many focused single-file audits concurrently - each reading one file with its imported neighbours in full - alongside a whole-repository survey, adversarial re-reads of the top files, and model-free structural checks. Independent reviews are folded together and the most corroborated, precisely-localized issues lead the report; each finding is pinned to an exact file and function. Decoding is deterministic. Self-contained, stdlib-only, with no hardcoded or project-specific content.
